# cJSON (vendored)

Source: <https://github.com/DaveGamble/cJSON>
Version: v1.7.18

Only `cJSON.c` and `cJSON.h` are needed for our build. Tests, examples, and
fuzzing harnesses from upstream are not vendored.

License: MIT (see `LICENSE`).

To update, replace `cJSON.c`, `cJSON.h`, and `LICENSE` with the corresponding
files from the desired upstream tag, then bump the version above.
